name: hotel-booking-system
description: Complete hotel room booking system with Booking.com API and Monri payment gateway

scripts.minify:js: terser frontend/js/main.js -c -m -o frontend/js/main.min.js && terser frontend/js/api.js -c -m -o frontend/js/api.min.js && terser frontend/js/analytics.js -c -m -o frontend/js/analytics.min.js
scripts.minify:all: npm run minify:js && npm run build:css

author: Senior Full-stack Developer
